home_description: Software developer focused on scalable business applications and data-driven solutions with .NET and Python.
about_description: I build scalable business applications and data-driven solutions with .NET and Python. My focus is on digitalizing internal processes through automation, REST APIs, and machine-learning-supported functions. I combine hands-on technical execution with an understanding of business processes, from requirements engineering to deployment. Outside of work, I enjoy music, traveling, photography, and discovering new cultures and experiences.
skills_app_programming_years: Core stack for development and automation
qualification_medical_informatics: Master of Science in Medical Informatics
qualification_medical_engineering: Bachelor of Science in Medical Engineering
qualification_detail_oif:
Development of internal business applications and web applications with .NET and Python for company-wide use.
Implementation of REST APIs and system integrations.
Development of new software solutions for the digitalization of internal business processes.
Implementation of OCR- and machine-learning-based features for automated data processing.
Analysis of business processes and implementation of technical solutions as part of requirements engineering.
Support for database design and further development of existing applications based on SQL Server.
qualification_detail_syntax:
Supporting participants with Kotlin and Swift projects.
Conducting code reviews and technical workshops.
Creating exercises and learning materials.
qualification_detail_testio: Carrying out structured software tests, documenting bugs, and supporting quality assurance from the user perspective across different platforms.
qualification_detail_mila: Providing on-site technical support, troubleshooting issues, and delivering service-oriented solutions in hands-on technical assignments.
qualification_detail_ey:
Analyzing SAP security structures and IT processes.
Supporting IT audits and process analyses.
Preparing technical reports and presentations for clients.
qualification_detail_aldi:
Developing SQL queries to analyze and verify test data.
Creating automated test reports.
Building custom batch scripts to automate data queries.
Reducing manual reporting effort through automated evaluations.
qualification_detail_ge:
Developing automated UI tests for medical ultrasound software with C# and Ranorex.
Integrating automated tests into a Jenkins CI pipeline.
Automating data verification and validation of software functions.
Reducing manual testing effort through comprehensive test automation.
qualification_detail_act: Supporting IT-related tasks, technical topics, and the implementation of digital solutions in a nonprofit environment.
qualification_detail_edelhelfer: Contributing to operational and digital tasks, supporting organization, and helping with practical day-to-day workflows.
qualification_detail_intermedcon:
Developing an Android app in Java as part of an EU research project.
Implementing backend API integration and data processing.
Developing and adapting UI components as well as database components.
The application was used productively and published in the Google Play Store.
qualification_detail_ruhrschule: Teaching technical content, preparing learning materials, and supporting participants in classroom and training settings.
services_app_dev_mobile: Development of mobile applications in Java, Kotlin, Xamarin, and Swift.
services_app_dev_ui: Building user-friendly interfaces for enhanced user experience.
services_app_dev_backend: Integration of back-end services and databases for robust app functionality.

services_automation_python: Expertise in Python for developing automation scripts and tools.
services_automation_tools: Proficient in automation tools like Selenium, Ranorex, and Jenkins for streamlined workflows.
services_database_sql: Development and management of SQL, MySQL, and PostgreSQL databases.
services_database_custom_solutions: Custom database solutions for efficient data handling and storage.
services_testing_software_applications: Expert testing of software applications for functionality, performance, and security.
services_testing_quality_assurance: Quality assurance to meet industry standards for both software and hardware products.
